raw_segments.text: E-brands చేస్తున క్లింస్ అయితే ఆస్లు పిచ్చి లేపుతున్నే ఏం ఈ బ్రాండ్ యొక్క ఫాఉన్డ్ర్ గొడ్ ఒక ఇంఫ్లేర్న్సరే ఇంస్టెంట్ బ్రాఇట్నేస

If you decode it clearly, it is not correct for you to generate AI videos for sale and attract people in this style. And you don't believe in such skin care brands at all. No skin care has ever given instant results. Whatever I suggest as an influencer, whatever I promote, whatever the products the doctors say, the results will come only if you use it consistently. Don't believe any doctor or any influencer that any product will give you instant results. Instant results will come with the help of high-end machinery only for a short time.
